incident: The 2026-07-08 CCW catalogue pull (data/reference/ccw-products.json, 1737 products via Shopify products.json) stripped body_html for size, silently losing the SDS PDF links embedded in product descriptions — needed for the Commercial Floor Care 'current SDS on file' grounding (WHS Reg 346).
recovery: Re-fetched body_html from the live feed same day; extracted SDS links by classifying PDF anchors on anchor text OR href matching /\bsds\b|msds|safety[-_ ]?data/i (filename alone misses ~85% — e.g. 'SAFETY DATA SHEET' anchors pointing at product-code PDFs); excluded non-http(s) links (retailer copy contained a broken file:///C:/Users/... path). 353/1737 products enriched with sdsUrls.
lesson: When trimming scraped fields for size, extract derived-value fields (SDS/document links) BEFORE discarding the raw source; classify SDS links by anchor text, not filename; validate URL scheme on scraped links.
